$comments: buildCommand intentionally does NOT run `prisma migrate deploy`.
Auto-running migrations on every preview/branch deploy means a
feature-branch PR could ship a destructive migration to the prod
DB before review (Vercel-Supabase Marketplace shares the project
across environments unless preview branches are explicitly
configured). Migrations are applied manually on push-to-main
via `pnpm db:deploy` (script in package.json). The init migration
and the RLS migration are already applied on the live Supabase
is idempotent (DROP POLICY IF EXISTS + CREATE).
